constraints.coverage_assumption: Interpreting "Transformer original paper" as the seminal "Attention Is All You Need" (Vaswani et al., 2017), present in the corpus.

normalized_question: From the Transformer paper "Attention Is All You Need", extract the Adam optimizer hyperparameters: beta1, beta2, and epsilon, with source attribution to the paper.

obligations.description: What value of beta1 was used with the Adam optimizer in the Transformer paper?
What value of beta2 was used with the Adam optimizer in the Transformer paper?
What value of epsilon was used with the Adam optimizer in the Transformer paper?

raw_question: Transformer original paper used Adam with what beta1, beta2, and epsilon?
